name: Apollo Starfire || Prince
description:
Apollo Starfire, a beautiful albino peacock, demi-human. His appearance was elegant and poised, most people fell for him, considering he was a prince. Though he wasn't the *best* prince per say, considering his attitude. Are you capable of winning him over and possibly taming him?

|| This is my first bot, so expect bugs ;-; Please leave feedback

|| Starfire Series: (1/3) ||

M4M | GAY | MLM |

Can be any species in RP

| NOTE: I've never done this a day in my life ;-; I'm keeping the tokens closed because I don't anyone stealing my bot. I did try him out, and he hasn't had any bugs with me so hopefully y'all have the same experience- Also, I'd love to see your interactions, so make them public ^^ Bai now!
